title: BEM-831 execute missing proof
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-22 | 05:50 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
prev=load('governance/state/bem830_read_bem829_and_continue.json')
missing=prev.get('missing',[])
if 'workflow_dispatch_results' in missing:
    # Create a minimal self dispatch queue item to prove result writer independent of Claude target, plus Claude retry item.
    selfq=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem831_self_dispatch_probe.json')
    selfq.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v5','workflow':'codex-runner.yml','workflow_id':'codex-runner.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-831 prove workflow_dispatch_results writer with known workflow','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    claudeq=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem831_claude_dispatch_probe.json')
    claudeq.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v5','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-831 Claude dispatch retry after queue JSON fix','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    status='queued_self_and_claude_dispatch_probe'
    next_action='fresh tick; expect workflow_dispatch_results for bem831 probes'
elif 'claude_runtime_state' in missing:
    status='runtime_state_missing_repair_pending'
    next_action='parse dispatch result and patch Claude dispatcher runtime state writer'
elif 'real_claude_response' in missing:
    status='real_response_missing_repair_pending'
    next_action='patch Claude prompt/provider response writer'
else:
    status='all_proofs_present_process_protocol'
    next_action='process real Claude response and create agreed protocol'
state={'bem':'BEM-831','status':status,'input_missing':missing,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem831_execute_missing_proof_after_bem830.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem831_execute_missing_proof_after_bem830.md').write_text('# BEM-831 | Execute Missing Proof After BEM-830 | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem831_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-831'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem831_execute_missing_proof_after_bem830.json','governance/reports/bem831_execute_missing_proof_after_bem830.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem831_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']
if 'workflow_dispatch_results' in missing:
    changed.extend(['governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem831_self_dispatch_probe.json','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem831_claude_dispatch_probe.json'])
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Executed BEM-830 missing proof repair by creating self-dispatch and Claude-dispatch probe queue items when workflow_dispatch_results proof is missing')
"""
